name: Make-Ahead Cookie Mix (Macm)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a very large bowl, combine the butter, salt, and baking powder; blend well.
2. Lightly spoon the flour into a measuring cup; level off. Do not scoop or sift the flour.
3. Add the flour to the butter mixture; blend until fine crumbs form, scraping the bowl often.
Use this mix in following cookie recipes. Measure by dipping a cup into the mix and leveling off. Store tightly covered in the refrigerator up to 4 weeks. Makes 8 cups of mix.
